args.query:
SELECT 
  CASE WHEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(o.OwnerId),2) ELSE trim(o.OwnerId) END AS AgentId,
  SUM(CAST(oi.Quantity AS FLOAT) * CAST(oi.UnitPrice AS FLOAT)) AS total_sales
FROM "Order" o
JOIN OrderItem oi ON 
  (CASE WHEN substr(trim(o.Id),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(o.Id),2) ELSE trim(o.Id) END) = (CASE WHEN substr(trim(oi.OrderId),1,1) = '#' THEN substr(trim(oi.OrderId),2) ELSE trim(oi.OrderId) END)
WHERE date(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN date('2022-06-25') AND date('2022-11-25')
GROUP BY AgentId
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 1;

WHERE date(o.EffectiveDate) BETWEEN date('2022-06-25') AND date('2022-11-25')

ORDER BY total_sales DESC
LIMIT 1;
